bottom_line: Multiple QV gates needed multiple fix cycles (S08: 3, S14: 5, S15: 5), indicating the design doc underspecified edge cases; improve design-doc QV failure predictions and fix-cycle prompt diagnostics to reduce agent thrashing.
coverage_notes: Active item — worktree logs directory (.worktrees/) was not accessible from the self-assess context, so primary evidence (raw run logs) was unavailable. Analysis based on: (1) step reports (S01-S16, all secondary/agent-self-report), (2) fix-cycle prompt files (fix-cycles/ directory, primary evidence for failure patterns), (3) QV gate reports (S08-S15 reports, secondary). DB signal: full (iw db-identity check passed). Sampled: fix-cycle prompts for S08 (all 3 cycles), S14 (cycle 5 only as representative), S15 (cycle 1 as representative), S16 (cycle 2 only). Read in full: S01, S02, S04, S05, S06, S07, S12, S13, S14, S15, S16 reports.

findings.title: QV gates S08 / S14 / S15 each required multiple fix cycles to pass
findings.recommendation: Add a 'QV gate failure map' section to the design doc template — explicit predictions of which steps will likely need multiple fix cycles and why, listing known fragile areas so agents budget more fix cycles upfront.
evidence: ai-dev/active/F-00081/fix-cycles/F-00081_S15_FIX_cycle1_prompt.md:42 — '37 failed, 2054 passed' on first S15 attempt
findings.paste_prompt: /iw-new-cr Add a QV gate failure map section to the Feature Design template so agents can anticipate fragile steps; analyzed in F-00081 self-assess (see ai-dev/active/F-00081/reports/F-00081_self_assess_report.md). Target file: templates/design/Feature_Design_Template.md. Effort: S.

findings.title: S15 integration tests required 4 fix cycles — pre-existing test suite fragility
findings.recommendation: Investigate whether test_batch_manager_self_assess.py, test_browser_verification_flow.py, and test_f_00076_* tests have unstable fixture setup or ordering dependencies causing spurious failures on first run.
evidence: ai-dev/active/F-00081/reports/F-00081_S15_QvGate_report.md:215 — '2131 passed' after fixes — suggests race conditions in testcontainer lifecycle
findings.paste_prompt: /iw-new-incident Investigate and fix testcontainer session cleanup in test_batch_manager_self_assess.py and test_f_00076_* tests; first-run failures clear after retry suggesting ordering/race issues; analyzed in F-00081 self-assess (see ai-dev/active/F-00081/reports/F-00081_self_assess_report.md). Target files: tests/integration/conftest.py, tests/integration/test_batch_manager_self_assess.py. Effort: M.

findings.title: S16 browser verification found duplicate CLI options in dropdown
findings.recommendation: Clarify in the design doc whether the CLI dropdown should deduplicate by cli_label or show all catalogue rows. The current behaviour (showing all rows including duplicates like 'OpenCode', 'OpenCode', 'OpenCode') was called cosmetic by the agent but the spec should be explicit.
evidence: ai-dev/active/F-00081/fix-cycles/F-00081_S16_FIX_cycle2_prompt.md:71 — 'Each CLI option appears twice in the dropdown (e.g., OpenCode, OpenCode, OpenCode...)'
findings.paste_prompt: /iw-new-incident Fix duplicate CLI option display in runtime override dropdown (deduplicate by cli_label or group); found by S16 browser verification on F-00081 (see ai-dev/active/F-00081/reports/F-00081_self_assess_report.md). Target: dashboard/templates/fragments/item_overview.html. Effort: S.

findings.title: S04/S05 both independently discovered design-doc references non-existent StepStatus.paused
findings.recommendation: Add a 'Schema vs. Design Doc Discrepancy Protocol' to CLAUDE.md: when the design doc specifies behaviour the actual schema doesn't support, the agent should (a) note the discrepancy in its step report and (b) proceed with the schema-correct implementation rather than trying to match the design doc verbatim.
evidence: ai-dev/active/F-00081/reports/F-00081_S04_API_report.md:25 — 'StepStatus.paused does not exist — paused is a WorkItemStatus, not a StepStatus'

ai-dev/active/F-00081/reports/F-00081_S05_Frontend_report.md:117 — 'design doc says pending | failed | paused are editable. paused is a WorkItemStatus, not a StepStatus' (both discovered independently)
findings.paste_prompt: /iw-new-cr Add 'Schema vs. Design Doc Discrepancy Protocol' to CLAUDE.md — when design doc specifies behaviour the schema can't support, proceed with schema-correct implementation and note the discrepancy; analyzed in F-00081 self-assess (see ai-dev/active/F-00081/reports/F-00081_self_assess_report.md). Target: CLAUDE.md. Effort: S.

findings.title: S08 lint gate took 3 cycles due to opaque fix prompt (no parseable output)
findings.recommendation: Enhance the QV fix-cycle prompt generator to surface more diagnostic context from failed lint runs — which files, which rule, how many violations — so agents spend less time on trial-and-error in fix cycles.
evidence: ai-dev/active/F-00081/fix-cycles/F-00081_S08_FIX_cycle3_prompt.md:1 — FINAL fix cycle for a single lint error
findings.paste_prompt: /iw-new-incident Improve QV fix-cycle prompt to include parseable lint output (file, rule, count); S08 lint took 3 cycles with opaque error; analyzed in F-00081 self-assess (see ai-dev/active/F-00081/reports/F-00081_self_assess_report.md). Target: orch/daemon/qv_gate_validator.py. Effort: M.

findings.title: Worktree logs directory not accessible from self-assess context
findings.recommendation: Ensure .worktrees/<ID>/ai-dev/logs/ is populated for active items — the self-assessment skill relies on raw run logs as primary evidence; when missing the analysis degrades to secondary evidence (step reports).
evidence: bash output: 'no .worktrees dir' when running in the F-00081 worktree context — worktree logs not accessible during self-assess
findings.paste_prompt: /iw-new-incident Ensure .worktrees/<ID>/ai-dev/logs/ is populated for active items so self-assess can use raw run logs as primary evidence; analyzed in F-00081 self-assess (see ai-dev/active/F-00081/reports/F-00081_self_assess_report.md). Target: orch/daemon/worktree_compose.py or executor step-launch script. Effort: M.

findings.title: Pre-existing test failures conflated with F-00081 regressions in gate reports
findings.recommendation: Configure the QV gate aggregator to suppress pre-existing failures when computing whether an item's gates passed, so gate exit codes cleanly reflect whether the new code caused failures.
evidence: ai-dev/active/F-00081/reports/F-00081_S07_CodeReviewFinal_report.md:169 — '120 failures in test_step_monitor, test_merge_queue' labelled 'not caused by F-00081' but still counted in gate exit codes
findings.paste_prompt: /iw-new-cr Suppress pre-existing test failures in QV gate exit codes so gate results cleanly reflect new code regressions; analyzed in F-00081 self-assess (see ai-dev/active/F-00081/reports/F-00081_self_assess_report.md). Target: orch/qv_gate_validator.py, orch/test_runner.py. Effort: M.
